name: ai-translator
description: Full-stack AI Translator — React + Vite + Tailwind + Express

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
